prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约9283→10779→9731→11395→11457，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1700名；2025年基准约11457名；本省物理类计划2021年91人、2022年85人、2023年84人、2024年84人、2025年89人；2026年计划115人，较2025年扩招约29.2%，大幅扩招使竞争明显缓解，位次数字预计显著增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第38名，近年排名稳定在36–39区间，属全国顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争议，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第82、评价一般，短视频曝光量偏低；未见投档断档记录；控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A-、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，对物理类考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等东北大学优势专业均为高热推荐/推荐，社会报考热度高；本省2026年物理类考生约25.1万人（按近年占比估算），较2025年约24.98万人微增，竞争略有加剧；东北大学位于辽宁沈阳，在湖北招生占比约2.7%–3.2%，属跨省招生，无本省地域偏好优势；辽宁本省招生占比约21%–24%，湖北非其重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招29.2%是最大影响因素，使位次数字显著增大（更易进）；但物理类考生微增、计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热、学校985层次及A+学科吸引力等因素部分抵消扩招效应。，考虑考生竞争略加剧，小幅修正后预测最低位次约13415名，区间12915–13915名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 人工智能（未来技术学院/知行英才班）
- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化等）
- 计算机类（软件工程、信息安全等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程）
- 机器人工程
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 机械类（机械工程、车辆工程等）
- 智能制造工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（材料科学与工程、材料成型及控制工程等）
- 工科试验班（冶金工程、能源与动力工程等）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间12915–13915名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如12900名以内）可重点冲击计算机科学与技术、人工智能、自动化类等A+/A学科专业；位次接近区间上限（如13800名以外）建议以二档的电子信息类、机器人工程、数学类为主，三档的材料类、工科试验班作为稳妥保底。东北大学控制科学与工程A+、计算机A等强势学科与当前社会高热专业高度重合，报考价值突出。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9283 → 10779 → 9731 → 11395 → 11457, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 1700 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 11457; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 91 in 2021, 85 in 2022, 84 in 2023, 84 in 2024, and 89 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 115, an increase of about 29.2% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition and expected to notably increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 38th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 36–39 range in recent years, a top national engineering powerhouse; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 82nd, with average reviews and low short video exposure; no record of admission gaps; Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A-, Metallurgical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, with a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, strong engineering strength, and strong appeal to Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Northeastern University's advantageous majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly popular/recommended, with high social application enthusiasm; the province's 2026 Physics Category candidates are about 251,000 (estimated based on recent proportions), a slight increase from about 249,800 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, with an enrollment proportion in Hubei of about 2.7%–3.2%, being a cross-provincial enrollment without local regional preference advantage; Liaoning's local enrollment proportion is about 21%–24%, and Hubei is not its key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2026 significant enrollment expansion of 29.2% is the biggest factor, making the ranking number notably larger (easier to enter); but factors such as a slight increase in Physics Category candidates, continued high popularity of Computer Science/Electronic Information and other hot majors, the school's 985 level and A+ discipline attractiveness partially offset the expansion effect. After considering slightly intensified competition, a minor correction predicts the minimum ranking to be about 13415, with a range of 12915–13915.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Technology College/Zhixing Talent Class)
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Computer Science (Software Engineering, Information Security, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Robotics Engineering
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Mechanical (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, etc.)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Forming and Control Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Metallurgical Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.)
- Chemistry (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Business Administration, Accounting, Finance, etc.)
- Bioengineering (Bioengineering, Biopharmaceuticals).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12915–13915, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12900), you can focus on impacting A+/A discipline majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Automation; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 13800), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors like Electronic Information, Robotics Engineering, and Mathematics, with Tier 3 majors like Materials and Engineering Experimental Class as a stable safety net. Northeastern University's strong disciplines such as Control Science and Engineering A+ and Computer Science A highly overlap with current socially popular majors, making the application value outstanding.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2776 → 2784 → 2915 → 3043 → 3040, showing a slight overall decline in recent years, with a cumulative decline of about 250 places in the last 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 3040; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 9 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 9 students, with enrollment scale unchanged for 6 consecutive years, no impact from expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 38th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with average Douyin popularity and no major negative public opinion; History Category has few majors, with limited attention; Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (control, computer science, metallurgy, etc.), while the History Category majors (Public Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature) lack corresponding A-class discipline support, making disciplinary appeal average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Public Administration corresponds to Business Administration/Public Administration disciplines without separate ratings, with divided and wait-and-see social popularity; Foreign Languages and Literature has average and wait-and-see social popularity; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in the province is approximately 142,700 (estimated based on recent proportions), a slight increase from approximately 141,400 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, with only 9 History Category enrollment spots in Hubei, a very small proportion, making it a cross-province niche enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the enrollment plan being unchanged for 6 consecutive years, a slight increase in History Category examinees, and the lack of advantageous discipline support for liberal arts majors at Northeastern University, with slightly intensified competition, the predicted minimum ranking after minor adjustment is approximately 3025, with a range of 2571–3479.
